articles.description: Unlock the full potential of your Steam Controller with 13 advanced features, from mouse emulation to custom virtual menus for unsupported games.
articles.content: The Steam Controller is a versatile gaming device that addresses the challenges of traditional controllers, as outlined by NerdNest. One notable feature is its mouse emulation, which turns the right … [+8095 chars]
